sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Key facts: CLARITY Act may boost XRP; Tokyo startup launches platform; $1.26B in XRP ETF inflows
feed.summary: The CLARITY Act could potentially increase XRP's price by reducing regulatory obstacles for institutional investors, similar to a previous rally after an SEC settlement. A Tokyo fintech startup has launched a global trade finance platform on the XRP Ledger, aiming to improve settlement efficiency. Despite $1.26 billion in net inflows to the XRP ETF sector, major XRP ETFs did not report new capital on March 4.

feed.title: Wilson Asset Management International PTY Ltd. Invests $5.70 Million in Microsoft Corporation $MSFT
feed.summary: Wilson Asset Management International PTY Ltd. has initiated a new position in Microsoft Corporation ($MSFT) by purchasing 11,000 shares valued at approximately $5.70 million during the third quarter. This investment makes Microsoft its 27th largest holding, accounting for about 1.4% of the fund's portfolio. Several other institutional investors have also adjusted their stakes in Microsoft, with the company showing strong financial performance and a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts despite some recent challenges.

feed.title: Western Wealth Management LLC Increases Stake in Microsoft Corporation $MSFT
feed.summary: Western Wealth Management LLC has increased its stake in Microsoft Corporation (NASDAQ:MSFT) by 2.8% in the third quarter, bringing its total holdings to 82,491 shares valued at $42.7 million. This makes Microsoft its 7th largest holding, representing about 2.3% of its investment portfolio. Other institutional investors and hedge funds have also significantly modified their positions in Microsoft.

feed.title: Left Brain Wealth Management LLC Invests $732,000 in Seagate Technology Holdings PLC $STX
feed.summary: Left Brain Wealth Management LLC has acquired a new stake of 3,100 shares, valued at $732,000, in Seagate Technology Holdings PLC during the third quarter. This move is part of broader institutional investment activity, with other major firms like Vanguard Group Inc. and State Street Corp also adjusting their significant holdings in the data storage provider. The article highlights both positive and negative sentiments surrounding Seagate, including its new HAMR platform and analyst target raises, alongside concerns about insider selling, sector risks, and valuation.

feed.title: Aptiv Announces Cash Tender Offer for 3.250% Senior Notes Due 2032, 5.150% Senior Notes Due 2034, 5.750% Senior Notes Due 2054, 5.400% Senior Notes Due 2049, 4.400% Senior Notes Due 2046, 4.150% Senior Notes Due 2052 and 3.100% Senior
feed.summary: Aptiv PLC has announced a cash tender offer to purchase several series of its outstanding Senior Notes, with an aggregate consideration of up to $1.35 billion. The offer is conditional upon the consummation of the previously announced spin-off of Aptiv's Electrical Distribution Systems business into Versigent, and a special dividend from Versigent to Aptiv. The offer has an Early Tender Deadline of March 19, 2026, and an Expiration Date of April 3, 2026.

feed.title: Costco to soon open first Forney store
feed.summary: Costco is set to open its first store in Forney, Texas, following the Forney City Council's approval of public improvements at the site during its March 3 meeting. The article notes that this new wholesale warehouse will soon be a part of the community. Dallas Business Journal is also seeking nominations for its 2026 Women in Business Awards.

feed.title: Heron Bay Capital Management Has $8.23 Million Position in MSCI Inc $MSCI
feed.summary: Heron Bay Capital Management significantly increased its stake in MSCI Inc. by 24.7% in Q3, now holding 14,507 shares valued at $8.23 million. Other institutional investors also adjusted their positions, and Wall Street analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average price target of $671.78. MSCI recently beat quarterly earnings expectations and raised its quarterly dividend, while CEO Henry Fernandez bought shares and the CFO sold some.

feed.title: Jim Cramer on Public Service Enterprise Group: "I Don't Want You to Buy Any"
feed.summary: Jim Cramer advised against buying Public Service Enterprise Group (NYSE: PEG) stock, citing his lack of enthusiasm for the bond market which he believes will dictate the utility's performance. Despite the company reporting strong Q4 2025 results, exceeding revenue and EPS estimates, and providing optimistic 2026 guidance and a substantial capital spending plan, Cramer remains cautious. He suggests that the bond market's performance is a key factor to consider before investing in PEG.

feed.title: Merck & Co., Inc. $MRK Holdings Cut by LOM Asset Management Ltd
feed.summary: LOM Asset Management Ltd reduced its stake in Merck & Co., Inc. ($MRK) by 59.7% in the third quarter, selling 9,187 shares and retaining 6,213 shares valued at approximately $521,000. Despite this, Merck beat quarterly earnings expectations with $2.04 EPS and $16.4 billion in revenue, also declaring a quarterly dividend of $0.85 per share. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating for the company with an average price target of $125.88.

feed.title: Palo Alto Networks founder Nir Zuk unveils 'AI-native' cybersecurity platform Cylake
feed.summary: Palo Alto Networks founder Nir Zuk has launched Cylake, an "AI-native" cybersecurity platform designed to replace on-premises or private cloud security solutions for large enterprises. Cylake aims to provide end-to-end security with hardware and software components, emphasizing operational sovereignty and countering AI-led threats using AI itself. Zuk is joined by cybersecurity veterans Ehud Shamir (co-founder of SentinelOne) and Wilson Xu (former EVP of engineering at Palo Alto), with the venture backed by Greylock.

feed.title: Zacks Research Analysts Raise Earnings Estimates for AM
feed.summary: Zacks Research has increased its Q1 2026 earnings per share estimate for Antero Midstream (NYSE:AM) to $0.27 from $0.24, maintaining a "Hold" rating on the stock. The consensus forecast for the full year 2026 is $0.95 EPS, with FY2028 projected at $1.19 EPS. Antero Midstream recently reported Q4 earnings of $0.28 per share, exceeding the consensus of $0.24, and revenue of $297 million, also above expectations.

feed.title: HC Wainwright Analysts Boost Earnings Estimates for ALDX
feed.summary: HC Wainwright has updated its earnings estimates for Aldeyra Therapeutics (ALDX), significantly improving the Q1 and full-year 2026 outlook, and even forecasting profitability in Q4 2026. While BTIG reissued a buy rating with a $9 target, the consensus remains a Hold with a $9.50 target. The stock is currently trading around $4.65 after beating EPS expectations in its recent quarter.

feed.title: Wall Street Analysts Are Bullish on Top Utilities Picks
feed.summary: Two Wall Street analysts have issued bullish ratings for Utilities sector stocks, specifically Northwest Gas (NWN) and Eversource Energy (ES). Stifel Nicolaus analyst Selman Akyol maintained a Buy rating for Northwest Gas with a $58.00 price target, while Wells Fargo analyst Shahriar Pourreza maintained a Buy rating for Eversource Energy with a $78.00 price target. The article highlights the analysts' success rates and average returns, along with the broader analyst consensus for each stock.

feed.title: Analysts Offer Insights on Technology Companies: Wealthfront Corporation (WLTH), Epam Systems (EPAM) and ServiceTitan, Inc. Class A (TTAN)
feed.summary: This article highlights bullish sentiments from financial analysts towards three technology companies: Wealthfront Corporation (WLTH), Epam Systems (EPAM), and ServiceTitan, Inc. Class A (TTAN). Wells Fargo analysts Robert P. Ryan and Jason Kupferberg maintained Buy ratings for Wealthfront and Epam respectively, while Piper Sandler's Billy Fitzsimmons maintained a Buy rating for ServiceTitan. All three companies are projected to have significant upside according to analyst consensus price targets.

feed.title: Crown Castle (NYSE:CCI) Upgraded at Zacks Research
feed.summary: Zacks Research has upgraded Crown Castle (NYSE:CCI) from a "strong sell" rating to a "hold" rating. Other analysts have also adjusted their ratings and price targets for the company, resulting in a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target price of $100.13. The article also details recent insider stock sales and institutional investor activity regarding Crown Castle shares.

feed.title: NYSE Parent Company ICE Acquires Stake In Crypto Platform OKX At $25B Valuation
feed.summary: Intercontinental Exchange (ICE), parent company of the NYSE, has acquired a minority stake in cryptocurrency exchange OKX, valuing the platform at $25 billion. This strategic investment aims to bridge traditional finance with the crypto landscape, fostering collaboration on market design, data services, and regulated futures contracts. The partnership seeks to provide compliant avenues for institutional crypto exposure and expand access to financial products for both ICE and OKX users, signaling a significant step towards mainstream integration of digital assets.

feed.title: Crown Castle (NYSE:CCI) Rating Increased to Strong-Buy at Sanford C. Bernstein
feed.summary: Sanford C. Bernstein upgraded Crown Castle (NYSE:CCI) to a "strong-buy" rating, indicating a positive outlook for the company's stock. This upgrade comes amidst several other analyst reports with varying price targets and ratings, resulting in an overall "Moderate Buy" consensus. The article also details recent insider transactions and institutional investment activity in Crown Castle shares.

feed.title: Heron Bay Capital Management Purchases 19,072 Shares of FactSet Research Systems Inc. $FDS
feed.summary: Heron Bay Capital Management significantly increased its stake in FactSet Research Systems Inc. (NYSE:FDS) by 52.6%, purchasing an additional 19,072 shares. This acquisition brings their total holding to 55,359 shares, valued at approximately $15.86 million, representing 3.0% of Heron Bay's portfolio. Other institutional investors, including Mitsubishi UFJ, Invesco, PFG Advisors, Barclays, and Vanguard, also boosted their positions, leading to institutional ownership of 91.24% in FactSet.

feed.title: Marietta Investment Partners LLC Sells 2,928 Shares of W.W. Grainger, Inc. $GWW
feed.summary: Marietta Investment Partners LLC reduced its stake in W.W. Grainger, Inc. by 24.0% in the third quarter, selling 2,928 shares and now owning 9,254 shares valued at $8.82 million. Despite this, other institutions like Parnassus Investments LLC, Norges Bank, and Vanguard Group Inc. significantly increased their holdings in the industrial products company. Analysts currently rate W.W. Grainger as a "Hold" with a consensus target price of $1,071.38, following recent earnings and dividend announcements.

feed.title: Digital Realty Trust (NYSE:DLR) Raised to "Strong-Buy" at Sanford C. Bernstein
feed.summary: Sanford C. Bernstein upgraded Digital Realty Trust (NYSE:DLR) to a "strong-buy" rating, contributing to the stock's overall "Moderate Buy" consensus from analysts. The real estate investment trust recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating estimates with $1.86 EPS on $1.63 billion in revenue, and made strategic acquisitions in Portugal and Bulgaria to expand its global footprint for cloud and AI workloads. Despite these positive developments and an analyst upgrade, the stock experienced a decline on the day of the report, potentially due to profit-taking or concerns over its valuation.

feed.title: Marietta Investment Partners LLC Invests $2.70 Million in ResMed Inc. $RMD
feed.summary: Marietta Investment Partners LLC recently acquired a new stake of 9,858 shares in ResMed Inc. (NYSE:RMD) totaling approximately $2.70 million. This investment comes amidst notable insider selling by ResMed's CEO and Director, while institutional investors now collectively own nearly 55% of the company. Analysts maintain a generally positive "Moderate Buy" rating for ResMed, with a consensus target price of $299.27, and the company has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.60 per share.

feed.title: Is Sempra (SRE) One of the Most Undervalued Utility Stocks to Buy Now?
feed.summary: Sempra (NYSE: SRE) is highlighted as one of the most undervalued utility stocks, with Wells Fargo raising its price target to $113 and maintaining an Overweight rating due to its strong asset base and capital expenditure plan. The company also announced an increase in its annualized common dividend to $2.63 per share. Sempra is a North American energy infrastructure company serving nearly 40 million consumers.

feed.title: Jim Cramer on Zscaler: “I Would Not Sell It Here”
feed.summary: Jim Cramer advised a caller not to sell Zscaler (NASDAQ: ZS) immediately but suggested lightening their position due to owning too many similar cybersecurity stocks (CrowdStrike, Rubrik, Cloudflare). Cramer believes Zscaler could see a bounce, after which the investor should consider selling some shares to reduce portfolio pain. The article also highlights Zscaler's record revenues and its cloud-based security offerings.

feed.title: Jim Cramer on Zscaler: "I Would Not Sell It Here"
feed.summary: Jim Cramer discussed Zscaler (ZS) on a call, advising a caller with multiple cybersecurity holdings not to sell ZS at its current price but to consider lightening their position during a bounce due to overexposure. Cramer emphasized the importance of not having too many similar stocks to avoid potential financial pain. The article also mentions Zscaler's cloud-based security platform and briefly promotes other AI stock opportunities.

feed.title: Jim Cramer on Paychex: “A Good Company, and It Shouldn’t Be This Low”
feed.summary: Jim Cramer expressed a bullish sentiment on Paychex (NASDAQ: PAYX), calling it a "good company" that is currently undervalued. He stated his intention to buy the stock at $17 given its 4.5% yield. This perspective contrasts with Fenimore Asset Management's observation that despite strong earnings, the stock sold off due to economic concerns and weak employment numbers for small to mid-sized businesses.

feed.title: Jim Cramer Says "Maybe There's a Recognition That Amazon Web Services Is Not Going to Be Wiped Out by Anthropic"
feed.summary: Jim Cramer discussed Amazon's stock performance, noting its recent rally after a significant post-earnings decline. He attributes some of this recovery to the recognition that Amazon Web Services (AWS) is unlikely to be overthrown by Anthropic. Cramer also addressed Amazon's massive CapEx forecast of $200 billion for the year, which initially overshadowed positive Q4 results, expressing his faith in CEO Andy Jassy's ability to navigate these investments despite short-term market reactions.

feed.title: Level Four Advisory Services LLC Acquires Shares of Western Digital Corporation
feed.summary: Level Four Advisory Services LLC has acquired 9,862 shares of Western Digital Corporation, valued at approximately $1,184,000, indicating their belief in the data storage provider's potential. This acquisition highlights continued institutional investor interest in Western Digital, with other funds also increasing their holdings. The firm bought its new position in the third quarter, signaling a positive outlook for the company's stock performance.

feed.title: Uber Shares Sold by Investment Firm
feed.summary: JT Stratford LLC, an institutional investor, has significantly reduced its stake in Uber Technologies, Inc. by selling 33,521 shares in the third quarter of 2026, lowering its holdings to 7,242 shares. This 82.2% reduction, valuing their remaining stake at $709,000, signals investor caution regarding Uber's stock performance amidst ongoing challenges like litigation and regulatory issues. The move highlights continued uncertainty about Uber's long-term prospects among major institutional investors.

feed.title: Alnylam and Tenaya sign $1.23bn cardiovascular target discovery deal
feed.summary: Alnylam Pharmaceuticals has partnered with Tenaya Therapeutics in a deal worth up to $1.23 billion to discover novel genetic targets for heart disease. Alnylam will pay an upfront fee of $10 million and up to $1.13 billion in milestone payments for drugs developed from these targets. This collaboration aims to expand Alnylam's presence in the cardiovascular market, building on the success of its ATTR-CM therapy, Amvuttra.

feed.title: Rovida Advisors Inc. Raises Stock Holdings in UnitedHealth Group Incorporated $UNH
feed.summary: Rovida Advisors Inc. significantly increased its stake in UnitedHealth Group (UNH) by 100%, now holding 30,000 shares worth over $10.3 million, making it their fifth-largest holding. This comes as UnitedHealth recently reported strong quarterly earnings, issued positive FY2026 guidance, and declared an annualized dividend of $8.84. Despite a recent stock dip, analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with a consensus price target of $372.13.

feed.title: Who's Moving Where In Wealth Management? – MSCI, Raymond James, Others
feed.summary: This article details recent significant personnel changes and team movements within the North American wealth management sector. Key appointments include Dinesh Gupta as Chief Data Officer and Head of Operations at MSCI, and Mick McLaughlin as the first US CEO at Hashdex, a crypto asset manager. Additionally, a team of six advisors managing over $800 million in client assets has transitioned from Commonwealth Financial Network to Raymond James' independent advisor arm.

feed.title: Chevron Inks 5-Year Deal to Supply Aussie Gas to Horizon Power
feed.summary: Chevron has signed a five-year agreement to supply approximately 14 petajoules of natural gas to Horizon Power, a utility in Western Australia, starting in 2027. The gas will come from Chevron's stakes in the Gorgon, Wheatstone, and North West Shelf projects. Chevron emphasized the crucial role of gas in supporting baseload electricity generation and backing up renewable energy in the state.

feed.title: Kroger CEO Greg Foran Talks Early Priorities During Q4 Earnings Call
feed.summary: Kroger CEO Greg Foran outlined his initial priorities for the company during the Q4 earnings call, focusing on internal improvements and streamlining existing operations rather than reinventing the business. Foran emphasized enhancing the customer experience both in-store and online, improving execution, and funding these initiatives through cost savings in areas like sourcing and technology. The company reported strong Q4 sales of $34.7 billion and significant growth in e-commerce, which is expected to become profitable in the first half of 2026.

feed.title: Heron Bay Capital Management Takes Position in Enphase Energy, Inc. $ENPH
feed.summary: Heron Bay Capital Management has initiated a new position in Enphase Energy (NASDAQ:ENPH), acquiring over 29,000 shares worth $1.039 million in Q3. The company shows positive operational momentum with a Q4 earnings beat and an expanded Vistra partnership for its IQ Batteries, yet it faces legal challenges from class-action lawsuits regarding an April–October 2025 period. Analysts currently rate Enphase as a "Hold" with a consensus price target of $43.28; despite insider sales, institutional investors own approximately 72.12% of the shares.

feed.title: Travel Accommodation Market Set to Witness Rapid Growth Through
feed.summary: Coherent Market Insights has released a comprehensive report on the Travel Accommodation Market, forecasting rapid growth through 2033. The study delves into industry trends, competitive dynamics, regional performance, and growth potential, providing essential insights for businesses. Key players like Marriott International Inc., Hilton Worldwide Holdings Inc., and Airbnb Inc. are highlighted, with segmentation by type and application.

feed.title: The secret vehicle Ford built that CEO Farley just gave to Pope Leo
feed.summary: Ford CEO Jim Farley and his wife gifted a specially customized 2026 Ford Explorer Platinum AWD hybrid SUV to Pope Leo XIV. The unique vehicle, built by a small team at Ford's Chicago Assembly Plant, features special hand-stitching, Chicago skyline etchings, and a hybrid powertrain not typically available in retail Explorers. The gift was motivated by Farley's deep Catholic faith and a desire to connect the Pope with Ford's Chicago roots.

feed.title: Q1 EPS Estimates for Kimco Realty Cut by Zacks Research
feed.summary: Zacks Research has lowered its Q1 2026 EPS estimate for Kimco Realty (NYSE:KIM) to $0.44 from $0.45, while forecasting a full-year 2026 EPS of $1.80. The company recently declared a quarterly dividend of $0.26 per share, implying a 4.4% yield and a payout ratio exceeding current earnings. Analysts have a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating for Kimco Realty with a target price of $24.23.

feed.title: Q1 Earnings Forecast for Chime Financial Issued By KeyCorp
feed.summary: KeyCorp has initiated its Q1 2026 earnings estimates for Chime Financial (NASDAQ: CHYM), forecasting an EPS of $0.04 and assigning an "Overweight" rating with a $30 price target. Despite Chime Financial recently beating Q4 2025 consensus with $596.4 million in revenue, the company remains unprofitable. The stock currently holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus from MarketBeat with a target price of $32.28, while insiders have recently sold approximately 256,539 shares.

feed.title: General Mills Names Jonathan Ness Chief Supply Chain Officer
feed.summary: General Mills has appointed Jonathan Ness as its new Chief Supply Chain Officer, effective March 16, 2026. He will report directly to Chairman and CEO Jeff Harmening and will be responsible for the company's global supply chain operations. Harmening highlighted Ness's significant contributions to the supply chain organization, emphasizing his leadership in strategy and transformation initiatives.

feed.title: Q1 EPS Estimate for Baxter International Lowered by Analyst
feed.summary: Zacks Research has lowered its Q1 2026 EPS estimate for Baxter International (NYSE:BAX) to $0.35 from $0.47, maintaining a "Hold" rating. This follows several other firms, including Goldman Sachs and Wells Fargo, trimming price targets or downgrading shares, resulting in a consensus "Hold" rating and an average price target of $20.10. The company recently missed its quarterly EPS but beat revenue estimates and provided FY2026 guidance between $1.85 and $2.05 per share.

feed.title: Jefferies Adjusts Price Target on Extra Space Storage to $170 From $158, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Jefferies has increased its price target for Extra Space Storage (EXR) to $170 from $158, while reiterating a "Buy" rating on the stock. This adjustment comes after other analysts like Barclays and Goldman Sachs also recently updated their price targets for the self-storage REIT. The company specializes in owning and managing self-storage facilities, with its real estate portfolio comprising over 4,000 assets in the United States.

feed.title: Marietta Investment Partners LLC Invests $2.39 Million in The Progressive Corporation $PGR
feed.summary: Marietta Investment Partners LLC has acquired a new stake of 9,681 shares, valued at approximately $2.39 million, in The Progressive Corporation (PGR) during the third quarter. This investment comes amidst recent insider selling activity, with company insiders offloading over $1.88 million worth of shares. Wall Street analysts currently rate Progressive as a "Hold," with an average target price of $245.50 against its current trading price of around $210.55.

feed.title: Analog Devices Stock: Quiet Chip Giant Riding the AI Wave
feed.summary: Analog Devices Inc. (ADI) is gaining attention as a "quiet chip powerhouse" supplying essential analog, mixed-signal, and power chips for AI data centers, EVs, and industrial machines. While not a pure GPU play like Nvidia, ADI's technology is critical for the real-world functionality of AI servers and edge devices, as well as EV powertrains and industrial automation. The company is seen as a "picks-and-shovels" investment benefiting from megatrends like AI infrastructure, EV transition, and industrial reshoring, offering a blend of dividend stability and growth potential.

feed.title: KKR’s CEOs Bought 175,000 Shares While Retail Investors Fled
feed.summary: Shares of KKR are down significantly year-to-date and from their peak, despite the company reporting record full-year Fee Related Earnings and substantial new capital raised. This decline is largely attributed to retail investor concerns over private credit quality following reports of rising non-accrual loans in KKR’s direct lending business. In contrast, KKR's Co-CEOs and other board members have been actively buying shares, signaling internal confidence.

feed.title: Henry Schein Posts Strongest Sales Growth in 15 Quarters: Here’s What the Numbers Say
feed.summary: Henry Schein reported its strongest quarterly sales growth in 15 quarters, with Q4 revenue up 7.7% year-over-year to $3.4 billion, exceeding expectations. This performance is largely attributed to a significant increase in high-margin specialty products revenue and signals a strong recovery in the dental and medical supplies market. The company, under new CEO Frederick Lowery, is implementing a BOLD+1 plan aimed at improving operating income, and Wall Street maintains a mixed but generally positive outlook with an average price target implying a 12% upside.

feed.title: INVESTOR NOTICE: Enphase Energy, Inc. Investors with Substantial Losses Have Opportunity to Lead the Class Action Lawsuit – Company Announcement - FT.com
feed.summary: Robbins Geller Rudman & Dowd LLP announces a class action lawsuit against Enphase Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ: ENPH) for alleged violations of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934 between April 22, 2025, and October 28, 2025. The lawsuit claims Enphase overstated its ability to manage inventory and mitigate effects from the 25D Credit termination, leading to a stock price drop after their Q3 2025 financial results. Investors who suffered substantial losses have until April 20, 2026, to seek appointment as lead plaintiff.

feed.title: Procter & Gamble Investor Reduces Stake by 82%
feed.summary: Investment firm JT Stratford LLC significantly reduced its stake in Procter & Gamble (NYSE:PG) by 82% in Q3, now owning 2,440 shares valued at $375,000. This divestment, which suggests potential concerns about growth or valuation among some investors, nonetheless highlights the continued monitoring of institutional ownership changes in bellwether consumer staples stocks like Procter & Gamble.

feed.title: 3,603 Shares in Amgen Inc. $AMGN Purchased by Integrity Advisory Solutions LLC
feed.summary: Integrity Advisory Solutions LLC recently acquired 3,603 shares of Amgen Inc. (NASDAQ:AMGN) worth approximately $1.02 million in the third quarter of 2025. Amgen reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates, and announced a quarterly dividend of $2.52 per share. Pipeline developments are mixed, with a new Phase 3 trial launch but also the halt of a rocatinlimab trial due to safety concerns, leading to some analyst downgrades.

feed.title: Longfellow Investment Management Co. LLC Cuts Holdings in Norfolk Southern Corporation $NSC
feed.summary: Longfellow Investment Management Co. LLC significantly reduced its stake in Norfolk Southern Corporation (NYSE:NSC) by 51.7% in the third quarter of 2025, selling 3,333 shares and retaining 3,120 shares valued at $937,000. Despite this, other hedge funds increased their holdings, and analysts maintain a "Hold" consensus rating with an average target price of $304.47. Norfolk Southern surpassed quarterly EPS estimates but saw a slight revenue decline, and it continues to pay a quarterly dividend of $1.35.

feed.title: Norfolk Southern (NYSE:NSC) Raised to Hold at Zacks Research
feed.summary: Zacks Research upgraded Norfolk Southern (NYSE:NSC) from a "strong sell" to a "hold" rating following several other analyst adjustments, including price target changes and rating upgrades from firms like Barclays, Susquehanna, Morgan Stanley, and Robert W. Baird. The railroad operator recently reported strong Q4 earnings, surpassing analyst estimates, with revenue of $3 billion. Institutional investors have slightly increased their holdings in the company, which has a current market capitalization of $69.97 billion.
